format: Long-form panel podcast (avg 1.5h-3h full episodes) + medium-length interview clips (10-30 min)
fetch_method: yt-dlp flat-playlist of /@allin/videos, top 80 by recency
selection_strategy: Prioritized 1-33 min clips over 60-180 min full episodes; balanced across business interviews, finance commentary, politics, AI panels.
